Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on cardiovascular issues, infections, and diabetes complications, without mentioning any lipid abnormalities or ongoing management of such conditions. The absence of any lipid-related diagnosis or treatment indicates that there is no strong basis to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
